SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Application
 
ChecksumDto
Integrity metadata for a stored file.
ClamAvVirusScanner
VirusScanner backed by a ClamAV clamd daemon using the INSTREAM command.
CorsConfig
Global CORS configuration for the application.
CreatedSecureSend
Internal creation result; the raw token is returned once and is never persisted.
CreateSecureSendRequest
 
FileAccessException
Exception for file access and read operation failures
FileController
 
FileDeletionException
class to handle File Deletion Exception
FileDto
 
FileNotFoundException
Sample class to throw File Not Found Exception
FileResource
 
FileScanResult
Result of scanning a single file.
FileScanResultDto
A single infected or errored file within a scan result.
FileService
Service for file-level operations within a user's storage area: uploading, deleting, renaming or moving, reading content, and loading files as downloadable resources.
FolderContentItemDto
 
FolderController
 
FolderDto
 
FolderListItemDto
 
FolderService
 
GlobalExceptionHandler
 
InvalidPathException
class to handle Invalid Path Exception
InvalidSecureSendPasswordException
 
JwtAuthFilter
Minimalistic JWT authentication filter for Cloud Page backend.
JwtUtil
Utility class for creating and parsing JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
OpenApiConfig
Configuration class for OpenAPI / Swagger documentation.
PageResponseDto<T>
 
RateLimitCategory
Classes of file operations that each carry an independent rate-limit budget.
RateLimitDecision
Outcome of a single rate-limit check.
RateLimitFilter
Applies per-user / per-IP (and optional instance-wide) rate limits to the file upload, download, listing and virus scan start endpoints.
RateLimitProperties
Configuration for RateLimitFilter, bound from cloudpage.rate-limit.* (and therefore overridable via environment variables, e.g.
RateLimitProperties.Policy
A token-bucket policy: capacity tokens, fully refilled every refillPeriod.
RateLimitProperties.Tier
A set of per-category policies.
RateLimitService
Resolves and evaluates the token buckets that back RateLimitFilter.
ResourceNotFoundException
 
ScanJob
Mutable state of a single asynchronous folder scan, owned by one user.
ScanJobDto
API view of an asynchronous folder scan job: status, metadata, and any threats found.
ScanStatus
Lifecycle state of an asynchronous folder scan job.
ScanVerdict
Outcome of scanning a single file.
SearchFilter
Optional metadata filters and sort controls for the folder search endpoint.
SearchResult
 
SecureSend
An expiring external download link for one file owned by a Cloud Page user.
SecureSendController
 
SecureSendDto
 
SecureSendRepository
 
SecureSendResource
Internal result containing the pinned file path and its download metadata.
SecureSendService
Creates, lists, revokes, and resolves expiring external links to individual files.
SecureSendUnavailableException
Returned for unknown, expired, revoked, or no-longer-readable Secure Send links.
SecurityConfig
 
TrashController
Endpoints for a user's trash: listing entries, restoring them, or permanently deleting them.
TrashEntry
A file that has been soft-deleted into a user's trash.
TrashEntryDto
 
TrashEntryRepository
 
TrashService
Implements a per-user trash (soft delete).
UnauthorizedAccessException
class to handle Unauthorized Access Exception
User
 
UserRepository
 
UserService
Service for resolving the currently authenticated user from the Spring Security context.
VirusScanConfig
Wires the virus-scan configuration properties and the background executor that runs scans.
VirusScanController
Endpoints for asynchronously scanning a user's folder for viruses.
VirusScanner
Abstraction over a virus-scanning engine.
VirusScanner.ScanResult
Verdict for a single file, with an optional threat name when infected.
VirusScanProperties
Configuration for the folder virus-scan feature.
VirusScanService
Runs asynchronous virus scans over a user's folder.
